trajectory.script: Flyway migrations V1-V4 create schema, workspace support tables, templates, and demo data
JWT auth, password complexity, lockout policy, AES-256 converters, RBAC, rate limiting, immutable auditing
Reservation conflict checks, essential asset dependency handling, maintenance SLA/state flow, finance idempotency/checksum logic
Expose REST controllers and static offline UI for requester, front desk, maintenance, operations, and administrator workspaces
Nightly encrypted backup, 30-day inspection generation, and banner notification processing
